title: Real Estate Consultant (Polish, Italian, German, Spanish)
description_text:
Tanami Properties is a premier real estate agency in Dubai, recognized for its expertise in off-plan properties and luxury real estate. With strong partnerships with top developers, we provide our clients with exclusive access to Dubai’s most lucrative investment opportunities. Join our team and be part of a company that’s setting new standards in the Dubai real estate market.
Role Overview:
We are looking for a motivated and results-driven Real Estate Consultant (Polish, Italian, German, Spanish) to join Tanami Properties. You will specialize in connecting clients with upcoming projects, guiding investors and end-users through off-plan purchases, and maximizing sales opportunities in Dubai’s fast-growing property market.
Key Responsibilities:
Promote and sell off-plan properties directly from top-tier Dubai developers.
Develop and maintain strong relationships with investors, end-users, and developer sales teams.
Advise clients on project details, payment plans, ROI, and market trends.
Conduct property presentations, attend project launches, and represent the company at real estate events.
Generate and manage leads through marketing campaigns, referrals, and networking.
Achieve and exceed monthly and quarterly sales targets.
Proven sales experience (off-plan real estate experience preferred)
Strong presentation and negotiation skills
Ability to build lasting relationships with investors and property buyers
Self-motivated, energetic, and target-driven
Unlimited Earning Potential with our Competitive Commission Structure
Rewards for Top Performers – Recognition and incentives for your outstanding achievements.
Career Growth & Progression – Clear paths to senior roles and leadership opportunities.
Employment Benefits – Full employment visa and medical insurance.
Exclusive Tools & Resources:
RERA License Provided by the Company
CRM system to manage clients efficiently
Marketing support, including professional video shoots
Fresh Leads Provided – Start your sales journey with pre-qualified client leads.
Exclusive Property Portfolio – Access to all developers and Dubai’s most lucrative off-plan projects.
Professional Training – Learn directly from big developers
Prime Office Location in Dubai Marina – Modern, centrally located office with a vibrant work environment.
Be Part of the Best – Join a top-performing team in one of Dubai’s top 10 real estate agencies and take your career to the next level.
Ready to take your real estate career to new heights! Apply now and become a key player in Dubai’s booming off-plan property market!
ai_core_responsibilities: The consultant will specialize in connecting clients with upcoming off-plan projects, guiding investors through purchases, and maximizing sales opportunities in Dubai's property market. Key duties include promoting and selling properties directly from developers and advising clients on project details, payment plans, and ROI.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must possess proven sales experience, preferably in off-plan real estate, along with strong presentation and negotiation abilities. The role requires being self-motivated, energetic, target-driven, and capable of building lasting relationships with investors and buyers.
linkedin_org_slogan:
Trusted Real Estate company!
Investment specialists in Dubai, UAE
linkedin_org_locations: Al Marsa Street, 3405, Dubai, Dubai 414476, AE
linkedin_org_description:
Tanami Properties is a company incorporated in United Arab Emirates, based in Dubai, with the Objective to add transparency to the UAE Real Estate Market by Delivering Unique Real Estate Knowledge and Remarkable Experience to its customers.

We partner with large developers such as Emaar, Damac, Dubai Properties, Nshama and many others and we are proudly a subsidiary of a large holding company, The Emirates Business Group.

Tanami Properties offers a full range of Real Estate services including Sales of Under Construction (New Developments) and Completed Properties, Investments Consultancy, Real Estate Advisory, Mortgage Advisory and Property Management.

Our team comes from different cultural and professional backgrounds, speaks more than dozen languages and each one of us specializes in the offered services. We have successfully sold Properties of over AED 500 Million worth in 2016, enabling many investors and families to meet their Real Estate objectives.

Our agency is client centric, ensuring our clients are assisted in the best possible way and advised with the right products that fulfills their Lifestyle and Financial Returns objectives.

Our Property Consultants ensure that both Investors and End Users are offered real estate developments that meet their requirements and at the same time achieve high returns of investment (both annual rental returns and Price appreciation).

We also offer property Investment Management and Advisory Services to Local, Regional and Global Investors with attractive opportunities, guaranteeing minimum risks with high yields.

Tanami Properties is certified by RERA, Dubai Land Department and is well positioned to service its Local and International Clients..

title: Assistant Business Manager
description_text:
Assistant Business Manager, Brown Thomas Grafton Street
Full Time
About the Charlotte Tilbury Brand
Founded by British makeup artist and beauty entrepreneur Charlotte Tilbury MBE in 2013, Charlotte Tilbury Beauty has revolutionised the face of the global beauty industry by de-coding makeup applications for everyone, everywhere, with an easy-to-use, easy-to-choose, easy-to-gift range. Today, Charlotte Tilbury Beauty continues to break records across countries, channels, and categories and to scale at pace.
Over the last 10 years, Charlotte Tilbury Beauty has experienced exceptional growth and is one of the most talked about brands in the beauty industry and beyond. It has become a global sensation across 50 markets (and growing), with over 2,300 employees globally who are part of the Dream Team making the magic happen.
Today, Charlotte Tilbury Beauty is a truly global business, delivering market-leading growth, innovative retail and product launches fuelled by industry-leading tech — all with an internal culture of embracing challenges, disruptive thinking, winning together, and sharing the magic. The energy behind the bran­d is infectious, and as we grow, we are always looking for extraordinary talent who want to be part of this our success and help drive our limitless ambitions
About Your Role
The Assistant Business Manager is a true brand ambassador, always reflecting the Charlotte Tilbury values. You are enthusiastic to meet and exceed targets, driving momentous team performance through maximum motivation. You place customer experience at the forefront of your leadership style, frequently thinking of new ways for the team to engage and satisfy the customer. You collaboratively work alongside your Business Manager in supporting seamless day to day operations on counter. Not only do you dare to dream it – you dare to do it.
Key Accountabilities
Drive financial results in store to meet and exceed targets and key performance indicators.
Support the Business Manager to determine individual and team sales targets and communicate with the Retail Artists to agree sales objectives and deliver them.
Demonstrate entrepreneurial spirit; being a specialist amongst the retail artistry brands and showing a genuine enthusiasm, commitment and interest in the Company’s performance.
Lead by example to promote exceptional customer service and creating a customer experience.
Coach and give feedback to the team to ensure Charlotte Tilbury standards are achieved in both areas of service and artistry.
Take every opportunity to extend exceptional customer service beyond the in-store experience; driving the customer database for direct marketing opportunities.
Implement individual and team development plans, conducting regular reviews that encourage two-way feedback and coaching.
Create a positive and cooperative team culture in store, through team meetings and a collaborative management style; recognizing and celebrating performance where necessary.
Entrepreneurial with proposing plans, events and other limitless activity to unlock commercial success.
Maintain impeccable visual merchandising, counter cleanliness and hygiene standards.
Execute flawless grooming standards, inspiring your team to be and feel the best versions of themselves.
We offer a structured induction programme – Charlotte’s Magic Academy. This exclusive and bespoke induction trains on all aspects of the role that you will need to succeed in providing red carpet customer experience with follow up training provided during your first months of employment. Focusing on artistry and commerce, you will gain a full understanding of our artistry and service expectations
Structured career development – our team of industry experts are here to support and work with you to explore your learning potential and career goals
You receive exclusive launches of our incredible products before anyone else – not only that, but you even receive a full Charlotte Tilbury Look on completion of Charlotte’s Magic Academy so you can be a true brand advocate.
Access to Tilbury Treats – our very own rewards platform allowing you to save money and gain ‘money can’t buy’ discounts on anything from gym memberships to cinema tickets
Other fabulous benefits such as life assurance, birthdays off work, team sales incentives and many more.
At Charlotte Tilbury, our mission is to empower everybody in the world to be the most beautiful version of themselves. We support this by encouraging and hiring people with diverse backgrounds, voices, beliefs, and perspectives into our growing global workforce. By doing so, we better serve our communities, customers, employees - and the candidates that take part in our recruitment process.
WE WOULD LOVE TO WELCOME YOU TO OUR DREAM TEAM…APPLY TODAY!
ai_core_responsibilities: The Assistant Business Manager drives financial results and supports the Business Manager in achieving sales targets while ensuring exceptional customer service. They also coach the team and maintain high standards of visual merchandising and hygiene.
ai_requirements_summary: The role requires enthusiasm for the brand and a commitment to customer experience, along with the ability to motivate and lead a team. Candidates should demonstrate an entrepreneurial spirit and a genuine interest in the company's performance.
linkedin_org_locations: 17/F, Crystal Galleria , 68 Yuyuan Road, Jing’an Shanghai, Shanghai, CN
10/F, Lee Garden Five, 18 Hysan Avenue, Causeway Bay, Hong Kong, HK
linkedin_org_description:

Today, Charlotte Tilbury Beauty continues to break records across countries, channels, and categories and to scale at pace.

Over the last 10 years, Charlotte Tilbury Beauty has experienced exceptional growth and is one of the most talked about brands in the beauty industry and beyond. It has become a global sensation across 50 markets (and growing), with over 2,300 employees globally who are part of the Dream Team making the magic happen.

Today, Charlotte Tilbury Beauty is a truly global business, delivering market-leading growth, innovative retail and product launches fuelled by industry-leading tech — all with an internal culture of embracing challenges, disruptive thinking, winning together, and sharing the magic. The energy behind the bran­d is infectious, and as we grow, we are always looking for extraordinary talent who want to be part of this our success and help drive our limitless ambitions.

title: SoHo Account Manager
locations_alt_raw: Komotini, East Macedonia and Thrace, Greece
description_text:
Ως Business Advisor θα αποτελείς βασικό πυλώνα της στρατηγικής ανάπτυξης της Vodafone, με στόχο την υποστήριξη και διεύρυνση του πελατολογίου SOHO (Small Office / Home Office). Η θέση επικεντρώνεται στην κατανόηση των επιχειρηματικών αναγκών, την παροχή εξατομικευμένων λύσεων και τη δημιουργία μακροχρόνιων σχέσεων εμπιστοσύνης με μικρές επιχειρήσεις.
Κύριες αρμοδιότητες:
Διαχείριση και ανάπτυξη χαρτοφυλακίου πελατών SOHO μέσω ενεργής επικοινωνίας και διατήρησης σχέσεων.
Κατανόηση των αναγκών των πελατών και πρόταση εξατομικευμένων λύσεων επικοινωνίας και ψηφιακών υπηρεσιών.
Σύνταξη και παρουσίαση εμπορικών προσφορών προσαρμοσμένων στις ανάγκες των πελατών και στο χαρτοφυλάκιο προϊόντων της Vodafone.
Υποστήριξη των πελατών στη χρήση των ψηφιακών εργαλείων της Vodafone, διασφαλίζοντας μια ομαλή και αποδοτική εμπειρία.
Συνεργασία με εσωτερικές ομάδες για την ομαλή ένταξη και υποστήριξη μετά την πώληση.
Πτυχίο ανώτατης σχολής (προαιρετικό)
Δίπλωμα οδήγησης
Ικανότητες επικοινωνίας και διαπραγμάτευσης.
Ομαδικό πνεύμα και προσανατολισμός στην επίτευξη στόχων.
Πάθος για την ανάπτυξη πελατολογίου και την επιτυχία των πελατών.
Προϋπηρεσία σε πωλήσεις B2B ή SOHO θα θεωρηθεί επιπλέον προσόν.
Ανταγωνιστικό πακέτο αποδοχών και παροχών.
Κάρτα υγείας
Μηνιαίο bonus βάσει επίτευξης στόχων.
Πρόσβαση σε προηγμένα ψηφιακά εργαλεία και πλατφόρμες.
Συνεργατικό και υποστηρικτικό εργασιακό περιβάλλον.
Συνεχής εκπαίδευση και ευκαιρίες επαγγελματικής εξέλιξης.
Πρόσληψη μέσω συνεργάτη της Vodafone.
ai_core_responsibilities: The Account Manager will manage and develop a portfolio of SOHO clients through active communication and relationship maintenance. They will understand client needs and propose personalized communication and digital service solutions.
ai_requirements_summary: A higher education degree is optional, and a driving license is required. Strong communication and negotiation skills, along with a passion for customer success and experience in B2B or SOHO sales, are preferred.
linkedin_org_slogan: BRAND EXPERIENCE AND FIELD MARKETING
linkedin_org_description:
Chapter Five Experiential Marketing Agency

We are in the Brand Experience territory since 2001 offering services such as field promotion, experiential sampling, merchandising, roadshows, mystery shopping, digital.

We aim at creating activities that bring brands close to the consumer with a positive mood; we offer a full package of services from concept and  planning till implementation. 

We offer innovative and drastic solutions that lead to the best possible results.

title: SoHo Account Manager
locations_derived: Nisia, Thessaly and Central Greece, Greece
description_text:
Ως Business Advisor θα αποτελείς βασικό πυλώνα της στρατηγικής ανάπτυξης της Vodafone, με στόχο την υποστήριξη και διεύρυνση του πελατολογίου SOHO (Small Office / Home Office). Η θέση επικεντρώνεται στην κατανόηση των επιχειρηματικών αναγκών, την παροχή εξατομικευμένων λύσεων και τη δημιουργία μακροχρόνιων σχέσεων εμπιστοσύνης με μικρές επιχειρήσεις.
Κύριες αρμοδιότητες:
Διαχείριση και ανάπτυξη χαρτοφυλακίου πελατών SOHO μέσω ενεργής επικοινωνίας και διατήρησης σχέσεων.
Κατανόηση των αναγκών των πελατών και πρόταση εξατομικευμένων λύσεων επικοινωνίας και ψηφιακών υπηρεσιών.
Σύνταξη και παρουσίαση εμπορικών προσφορών προσαρμοσμένων στις ανάγκες των πελατών και στο χαρτοφυλάκιο προϊόντων της Vodafone.
Υποστήριξη των πελατών στη χρήση των ψηφιακών εργαλείων της Vodafone, διασφαλίζοντας μια ομαλή και αποδοτική εμπειρία.
Συνεργασία με εσωτερικές ομάδες για την ομαλή ένταξη και υποστήριξη μετά την πώληση.
Πτυχίο ανώτατης σχολής (προαιρετικό)
Δίπλωμα οδήγησης
Ικανότητες επικοινωνίας και διαπραγμάτευσης.
Ομαδικό πνεύμα και προσανατολισμός στην επίτευξη στόχων.
Πάθος για την ανάπτυξη πελατολογίου και την επιτυχία των πελατών.
Προϋπηρεσία σε πωλήσεις B2B ή SOHO θα θεωρηθεί επιπλέον προσόν.
Ανταγωνιστικό πακέτο αποδοχών και παροχών.
Κάρτα υγείας
Μηνιαίο bonus βάσει επίτευξης στόχων.
Πρόσβαση σε προηγμένα ψηφιακά εργαλεία και πλατφόρμες.
Συνεργατικό και υποστηρικτικό εργασιακό περιβάλλον.
Συνεχής εκπαίδευση και ευκαιρίες επαγγελματικής εξέλιξης.
Πρόσληψη μέσω συνεργάτη της Vodafone.

title: Strategist
description_text:
🚀 Ready to Make an Impact? Join MORO TECH!
MORO TECH is a tech house with a global team on a mission to empower businesses to succeed through business transformation solutions, data-driven strategies and a deep technical expertise. 
Imagine being part of a team working alongside one of the world’s largest OEMs and shaping the future of the industry. 
Here, your ideas are not just welcomed, they are essential! We thrive on creativity, value diverse perspectives and foster an environment where everyone’s contributions are valued. If you are driven by the sense of doing meaningful work and growing in a dynamic company, let’s connect!
The impact of the role:
As a Strategist in the Strategy team, you will play a pivotal role in shaping and operationalizing strategies for connected services. Working at the intersection of business logic, digital processes, and project governance, you will help translate high-level visions into actionable target business models. Leveraging your experience, you will support innovation initiatives, ensure operational feasibility, and contribute to the delivery of compliant, value-driven digital services.

On a given day, a Strategist will:
Translate connected services strategies into concrete target business and operating models, bridging strategic vision and operational execution.
Design and implement operational and innovation frameworks that structure project development and streamline how new ideas are brought to market.
Investigate digital operational workflows to identify inefficiencies and potential privacy gaps, ensuring that connected services are compliant by design.
Analyse existing business processes and propose concrete improvements across various operational domains using Business Process Engineering methodologies.
Support stakeholder alignment by validating insights with end-users and key stakeholders, transforming findings into services with a clear business rationale.
Develop clear narratives, storylines, and visualisations to communicate project value, strategic direction, and outcomes to both technical teams and executive leadership.
Act as a transversal point of contact across strategy, technology, and data teams, preventing silos and ensuring continuity across workstreams.
Cooperate with Product Owners to translate strategic objectives into structured projects with defined KPIs, timelines, and deliverables.
Contribute to continuous improvement initiatives by identifying optimisation opportunities and supporting best practices in strategy execution and digital operations.
In order to be successful in this role you will need:
A Bachelor’s or Master’s Degree in Business, Management, Engineering, or a related field; an MBA is considered an asset but is not required.
Approximately 3 years of professional experience in management consulting, digital transformation, business operations, or similar roles, preferably within the Mobility or Tech sectors.
Strong experience in Business Process Engineering or process mapping (e.g., flowcharts, BPMN), with a keen eye for efficiency in digital workflows.
Familiarity with the lifecycle of digital products and services.
Proven ability to build compelling business cases, market analyses, and data-driven strategic narratives.
Experience organizing workshops and navigating complex stakeholder environments to reach alignment and consensus.
Working knowledge of Agile and/or traditional project management methodologies.
A proactive, results-oriented mindset with a strong sense of ownership and the ability to work effectively in ambiguous and fast-paced environments.
Native or professional fluency in English.
Availability to travel within the EU.
Perks that match your passion:
At MORO TECH, we don’t just talk about supporting our team, we build it into everything we do. Here’s how we invest in you.
💰 Your Expertise Rewarded
A competitive compensation package that grows with your impact.
Annual Performance and Salary Reviews to celebrate your progress.
⚡Supporting Your Daily Success
Monthly Meal Vouchers to fuel your creativity.
Premium Private Health Coverage for you and your family.
Extra vacation days to recharge and explore.
🌱 Never Stop Growing
Yearly training budget to master new skills.
Cutting-edge tech setup with optional upgrades to customize your gear.
Structured growth plans and regular progress check-ins.
🌍 Work Without Borders
Location-fluid culture with work-from-anywhere flexibility.
Modern workspaces designed for collaboration, open for visits as often as you like. 
Flexible working hours to accommodate your productivity peaks.
Please note that benefits may vary based on the location.
A glimpse at our principles:
We move at the speed of culture. We are always evolving, staying relevant through agility and an entrepreneur spirit.
We feel comfortable with the unknown. Innovation requires embracing uncertainty, and we do so with confidence and creativity. 
We act with passion. Whether we’re achieving our goals or learning from a failure, we do it passionately.
We enjoy being diverse. We are committed to fostering an environment where we can celebrate and embrace our diversity and each person's individuality so that people can bring their whole selves to work.
ai_core_responsibilities: As a Strategist, you will shape and operationalize strategies for connected services, translating high-level visions into actionable business models. You will also design operational frameworks and analyze business processes to propose improvements.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have a Bachelor's or Master's Degree in a relevant field and approximately 3 years of experience in management consulting or digital transformation. Strong skills in Business Process Engineering and familiarity with digital product lifecycles are essential.
linkedin_org_slogan: Digital Technology Engineering & Innovation Group of Companies adding value to the Private & Government sectors globally
linkedin_org_description:
MORO GLOBAL is a group of technology companies with a special interest in Smart & Autonomous Cars, Mobility & Connected Services, Smart City & Energy Systems, Aerospace & Defense Innovation, Venture Building & Scaling Operations.

Started in 2017 in Brussels, we are still expanding our portfolio of companies within the global technology and innovation ecosystem. 

Our offices are located in Japan, Belgium, Greece, Portugal, and Cyprus.

title: Freelance Statistics Expert with Python Expertise - AI Trainer
description_text:
Please submit your CV in English and indicate your level of English proficiency. 
Mindrift connects specialists with project-based AI opportunities for leading tech companies, focused on testing, evaluating, and improving AI systems. Participation is project-based, not permanent employment.
What this opportunity involves 
While each project involves unique tasks, contributors may: 
Design rigorous statistics problems reflecting professional practice; 
Evaluate AI solutions for correctness, assumptions, and constraints; 
Validate calculations or simulations using Python (NumPy, Pandas, SciPy, Statsmodels, and Scikit-learn); 
Improve AI reasoning to align with industry-standard logic; 
Apply structured scoring criteria to multi-step problems.
What we look for 
This opportunity is a good fit for statisticians with an experience in python open to part-time, non-permanent projects. Ideally, contributors will have: 
Degree in Statistics or related fields, e.g. Probability Theory, Mathematical Statistics, Applied Statistics, etc. 
3+ years of professional mathematics experience 
Strong written English (C1/C2) 
Strong Python proficiency for numerical validation 
Stable internet connection 
Professional certifications (e.g., PStat, CAP, SAS Certifications) and experience in international or applied projects are an advantage.
How it works 
Apply → Pass qualification(s) → Join a project → Complete tasks → Get paid
Project time expectations 
For this project, tasks are estimated to require around 10–20 hours per week during active phases, based on project requirements. This is an estimate, not a guaranteed workload, and applies only while the project is active. 
Payment 
Paid contributions, with rates up to $50/hour* 
Fixed project rate or individual rates, depending on the project 
Some projects include incentive payments 
*Note: Rates vary based on expertise, skills assessment, location, project needs, and other factors. Higher rates may be offered to highly specialized experts. Lower rates may apply during onboarding or non-core project phases. Payment details are shared per project.
ai_core_responsibilities: Contributors will design rigorous statistics problems and evaluate AI solutions for correctness and assumptions. They will also validate calculations using Python and improve AI reasoning.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have a degree in Statistics or related fields and at least 3 years of professional mathematics experience. Strong proficiency in Python and written English is also required.
linkedin_org_slogan: Be the “I” in AI with Mindrift. Work from anywhere on groundbreaking AI projects
linkedin_org_description:
Welcome to Mindrift — a space where innovation meets opportunity. We’re a pioneering platform dedicated to advancing the field of artificial intelligence through collaborative online projects. Our focus lies in creating data for generative AI, offering a unique chance for freelancers to contribute to AI development from anywhere, at any time.

At Mindrift, we believe in the power of collective intelligence to shape the future of AI. Our platform allows users to dive into a variety of tasks — ranging from creating training prompts for AI models to refining AI responses for greater relevance.

Let’s build the future of AI together, one task at a time.

title: Researcher, Third-Party Due Diligence
description_text:
The aim of compliance-driven due diligence is to assess our clients’ actual or potential counterparties, looking for any issues that might pose a reputational or other risk to them. 
As part of a dedicated team (VANTAGE), the compliance due diligence researcher role involves media research, working with databases, primary documents and other sources to uncover reputational and criminal issues and ultimate beneficial ownership, as well as making sense of complex corporate structures and identifying possible political and sanctions exposure.
Your main task will be to review, coordinate and report the findings of OSINT and HUMINT research concisely within short timeframes. A meticulous eye for detail is a must in this challenging, fast-paced role. The right candidate will be a team player who can maintain a positive attitude under pressure. You will be required to make sense of complex information and have a clear and crisp writing style. 
Work on a range of due diligence assignments, which include corporate compliance/ABAC/ESG and financial crime/IPO/KYC projects
Conduct media and database research using complex search criteria and following a strict methodology
Liaise with in-country source networks to obtain relevant compliance-related information not available via OSINT sources. 
Analyse search results within the context of the project and the country, 
Distil conclusions and identify indirect connections from research findings
Rate findings based on standard or tailored risk assessment methodologies
Summarise all relevant findings in a report
When required, brief and present findings to internal colleagues 
Collaborate with team members across the firm to deliver joint projects
Essential
Knowledge of research techniques, databases, networks, online registers and archives, and research in the general internet
Knowledge of the business, political, and social context of a geographical area
Native or equivalent fluency in English and Spanish 
Excellence in research and writing in English and clear communication style
Communicate complex topics verbally and in writing effectively
Ability to summarise large amounts of information in a clear and concise manner
Ability to manage and prioritise multiple tasks to tight deadlines
Curiosity, attention to detail and problem-solving skills
Ability to work independently and in a team
Education to degree level
Preferred 
Demonstrated professional experience 
Fluency in an additional language 
Control Risks offers a competitively positioned compensation and benefits package that is transparent and summarised in the full job offer.
We operate a discretionary global bonus scheme that incentivises, and rewards individuals based on company and individual performance.
Control Risks supports hybrid working arrangements, wherever possible, that emphasise the value of in-person time together - in the office and with our clients - while continuing to support flexible and remote working.
As an equal opportunities employer, we encourage suitably qualified applicants from a wide range of backgrounds to apply and join us and are fully committed to equal treatment, free from discrimination, of all candidates throughout our recruitment process.
ai_core_responsibilities: The role involves conducting media research and analyzing databases to uncover reputational and criminal issues related to clients' counterparties. Researchers will summarize findings and present them concisely within tight deadlines.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have knowledge of research techniques and the political and social context of geographical areas. Fluency in English and Spanish, along with strong research and writing skills, are essential.
linkedin_org_slogan: The global specialist risk consultancy - Helping organisations succeed in a volatile world
linkedin_org_locations: 33 King William Street, London, England EC4R 9AS, GB
linkedin_org_description: Control Risks is a global specialist risk consultancy that helps to create secure, compliant and resilient organisations. Combining unrivalled expertise, experience and reach with the power of data and technology, we provide the insight and intelligence needed to stay on track, realise opportunities and grow.

Ability to manage and prioritise multiple tasks to tight deadlines
Curiosity, attention to detail and problem-solving skills
Ability to work independently and in a team
Education to degree level
Preferred 
Demonstrated professional experience 
Fluency in an additional language 
Control Risks offers a competitively positioned compensation and benefits package that is transparent and summarised in the full job offer.
We operate a discretionary global bonus scheme that incentivises, and rewards individuals based on company and individual performance.
Control Risks supports hybrid working arrangements, wherever possible, that emphasise the value of in-person time together - in the office and with our clients - while continuing to support flexible and remote working.
As an equal opportunities employer, we encourage suitably qualified applicants from a wide range of backgrounds to apply and join us and are fully committed to equal treatment, free from discrimination, of all candidates throughout our recruitment process.

title: Property Consultant
description_text:
Tanami Properties is a premier real estate agency in Dubai, recognized for its expertise in off-plan properties and luxury real estate. With strong partnerships with top developers, we provide our clients with exclusive access to Dubai’s most lucrative investment opportunities. Join our team and be part of a company that’s setting new standards in the Dubai real estate market.
Role Overview:
We are looking for a motivated and results-driven Property Consultant to join Tanami Properties. You will specialize in connecting clients with upcoming projects, guiding investors and end-users through off-plan purchases, and maximizing sales opportunities in Dubai’s fast-growing property market.
Key Responsibilities:
Promote and sell off-plan properties directly from top-tier Dubai developers.
Develop and maintain strong relationships with investors, end-users, and developer sales teams.
Advise clients on project details, payment plans, ROI, and market trends.
Conduct property presentations, attend project launches, and represent the company at real estate events.
Generate and manage leads through marketing campaigns, referrals, and networking.
Achieve and exceed monthly and quarterly sales targets
Proven sales experience (off-plan real estate experience preferred)
Strong presentation and negotiation skills
Ability to build lasting relationships with investors and property buyers
Self-motivated, energetic, and target-driven
Unlimited Earning Potential with our Competitive Commission Structure
Rewards for Top Performers – Recognition and incentives for your outstanding achievements.
Career Growth & Progression – Clear paths to senior roles and leadership opportunities.
Employment Benefits – Full employment visa and medical insurance.
Exclusive Tools & Resources:
RERA License Provided by the Company
CRM system to manage clients efficiently
Marketing support, including professional video shoots
Fresh Leads Provided – Start your sales journey with pre-qualified client leads.
Exclusive Property Portfolio – Access to all developers and Dubai’s most lucrative off-plan projects.
Professional Training – Learn directly from big developers
Prime Office Location in Dubai Marina – Modern, centrally located office with a vibrant work environment.
Be Part of the Best – Join a top-performing team in one of Dubai’s top 10 real estate agencies and take your career to the next level.
Ready to take your real estate career to new heights! Apply now and become a key player in Dubai’s booming off-plan property market!
ai_core_responsibilities: The Property Consultant will promote and sell off-plan properties, develop relationships with clients, and advise them on project details and market trends. They will also generate leads and achieve sales targets in Dubai's property market.

Trusted Real Estate company!
Investment specialists in Dubai, UAE

Tanami Properties is a company incorporated in United Arab Emirates, based in Dubai, with the Objective to add transparency to the UAE Real Estate Market by Delivering Unique Real Estate Knowledge and Remarkable Experience to its customers.

We partner with large developers such as Emaar, Damac, Dubai Properties, Nshama and many others and we are proudly a subsidiary of a large holding company, The Emirates Business Group.

Tanami Properties offers a full range of Real Estate services including Sales of Under Construction (New Developments) and Completed Properties, Investments Consultancy, Real Estate Advisory, Mortgage Advisory and Property Management.

Our team comes from different cultural and professional backgrounds, speaks more than dozen languages and each one of us specializes in the offered services. Our Property Consultants ensure that both Investors and End Users are offered real estate developments that meet their requirements and at the same time achieve high returns of investment (both annual rental returns and Price appreciation).

We also offer property Investment Management and Advisory Services to Local, Regional and Global Investors with attractive opportunities, guaranteeing minimum risks with high yields.

Tanami Properties is certified by RERA, Dubai Land Department and is well positioned to service its Local and International Clients..

title: Group Tax Accountant
description_text:
Salary: £57,779 - £72,224 + Benefits + Profit Share BonusOffice based in Hythe, Kent
We care deeply about inclusive working practices and diverse teams. If you'd prefer to work full- time, part-time or as a job-share, we'll facilitate this wherever we can - whether to help you meet other commitments or to help you strike a great work-life balance. 
About
At Holiday Extras, we’re creating a workplace where everyone can thrive, build their careers and reach their limitless potential. As a Sunday Times Best Place to Work 2025, we’re proud to offer a world of benefits designed to enhance your lifestyle and well-being. By joining our team, you’ll feel supported and rewarded every day.
We’re looking for a Group Tax Accountant to play a key role in ensuring Holiday Extras meets its UK and EU tax obligations, while supporting the preparation of our statutory accounts and Group audits.
You’ll sit within our Group Finance team, working closely with colleagues across the business to provide robust tax compliance, clear financial insight and dependable support during reporting and audit cycles. This is a hands-on role with real breadth, offering exposure to a dynamic, multi-divisional, international business.
At Holiday Extras, finance is a true partner to the business. Our goal is to enable confident decision-making, support sustainable growth and make sure we continue to do the right thing for our customers, our partners and our people.
The Role
By joining our team you’ll:
Take ownership on VAT and Corporation Tax compliance across the UK and relevant EU jurisdictions
Prepare and submit UK and EU VAT returns, ensuring accuracy and timeliness
Keep up to date with tax legislation and ensure compliance with evolving regulations
Reconcile tax balance sheet accounts on a monthly basis
Support the Group Financial Controller with the annual audit process
Prepare the Group’s statutory financial statements and work closely with external auditors
Provide information to external tax advisers and review corporation tax computations
Contribute to ad hoc finance and tax projects led by the Group Financial Controller and Group CFO
What you can bring to our team: 
Strong experience of UK and EU VAT compliance, with a clear understanding of how regulations apply in practice
A professional accounting qualification (ACA or ACCA) with solid post-qualification experience
Experience preparing annual statutory accounts and supporting audits, with the ability to work effectively with external auditors and advisers
The ability to apply tax legislation in a balanced and practical way, balancing compliance with commercial reality in a fast-moving business
Advanced spreadsheet skills, including complex formulas, reconciliations and data analysis, enabling you to work efficiently and accurately
Clear and confident communication skills, allowing you to explain tax and financial matters to non-finance stakeholders in a straightforward, accessible way
A collaborative approach in order to build trusted relationships across finance and the wider business
Strong attention to detail alongside the ability fo manage tight, fixed deadlines without losing quality
A proactive, self-motivated mindset, comfortable taking initiative and contributing to continuous improvement
Experience with the Tour Operator Margin Scheme (TOMS) is advantageous, but not essential.
Everyone’s career path is individual and different, so this is just a guide. If your experience doesn't precisely match this, you’re encouraged to apply so that we can discover your unique talents!
How we hire for this role
We know your time is precious, so we keep our recruitment process as quick and easy as possible. If we believe you might be a match for a job you’ve applied for, you’ll enter our hiring process as follows:
Video interview with Recruiter & Group Financial Controller
F2F interview with Group FC & Group CFO
Meet the team 
Cultivating a diverse and inclusive culture is paramount for us. 
Recognising we are all different, if for whatever reason you need us to adapt the process, please get in touch via recruitment@holidayextras.com.
Applications Close: Friday 20th February 2026 Why choose Holiday Extras?
We believe that holidays are the most precious time of all, so we create products, tech and services that make travel and holidays memorable and fun. We’re on a mission to be the only place to go for your holiday extras, offering unparalleled choice, value and service, turning our customers’ ordinary trips into extraordinarily good times.
At Holiday Extras, we’re creating a workplace where everyone can thrive, build their careers and reach their limitless potential. As a Sunday Times Best Place to Work 2025, we’re proud to offer a world of benefits designed to enhance your lifestyle and well-being. By joining our team, you’ll feel supported and rewarded every day. Learn more about our culture and benefits.
Time is precious: 25 days annual leave (+BH’s), extra holidays through Holiday Buy, Birthday Day Off, and Sabbaticals at each milestone. 
Parental Leave: Enhanced parental leave - Up to 1 year off, including 13 weeks at 100% pay, 13 weeks at 50% pay
Road to well-being: Access to Gym Discounts, Private Dental Insurance and Private Medical Insurance (after 4 years)
Celebrate success together: Enjoy a Profit Share Bonus and a pension scheme with Aviva.
Good for the soul: Join our Social Club for 25% off any ticket or event in the UK, Discounts on the latest tech, or give back to your community with our Volunteering Scheme. 
Plan ahead: Income protection, Critical illness cover and Life assurance
ai_core_responsibilities: The Group Tax Accountant will ensure Holiday Extras meets its UK and EU tax obligations while supporting the preparation of statutory accounts and Group audits. This role involves VAT and Corporation Tax compliance, preparing financial statements, and collaborating with external auditors.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have strong experience in UK and EU VAT compliance and hold a professional accounting qualification (ACA or ACCA). They must also have experience in preparing annual statutory accounts and supporting audits, with advanced spreadsheet skills and clear communication abilities.
linkedin_org_slogan: Less hassle. More holiday.
linkedin_org_locations: Holiday Extras, Ashford Road, Newingreen, Hythe, Kent CT21 4JF, GB
linkedin_org_description:
At Holiday Extras, we offer our customers less hassle so that they can enjoy more holiday. Using innovative technology and the smartest, fastest and most personal service in travel, we bring great value airport hotels, airport parking, airport lounges, airport transfers, car hire, holiday insurance and adventures.     

With more than 40 years experience, there's nothing that our team of travel experts doesn't know about taking the hassle out of organising a holiday.       

Whether we are helping remove hassle in person, online or via the Holiday Extras AI-powered, hyper-connected and ultra-personalised mobile app, we provide an unrivalled experience to over 8 million travellers a year. And we aim to do so sustainably.      

Join us and be part of the most agile and innovative business in travel.

title: Sales Business Analyst
description_text:
Volton Hellenic Energy SA is a Greek company that is dynamically active and is rapidly increasing its capacity in the field of Electricity Supply and Trading, in the Gas Energy Sector and in the field of Telecommunications (through Orizon).
By offering reliable services that meet the ever-growing energy needs of businesses and households, Volton aims to build solid and trustful relationships with its customers. The company's ambition is to become one of the most important companies in the industry and remain at the forefront of developments as the first multiservice provider combining Electricity, Natural Gas and Telecommunications. 
As part of its development Volton strengthens its human resources in Athens and seeks a Sales Business Analyst.
We are looking for a Sales Business Analyst to join our team and support performance monitoring, reporting, and insight generation for commercial initiatives. The ideal candidate will have strong analytical capabilities, proficiency in Power BI, and the ability to present actionable insights to various stakeholders. This position collaborates closely with internal teams such as Billing, Data Warehouse, CBM, IT, and Product.
Responsibilities
Analyze sales performance data and identify trends, opportunities and areas for improvement
Develop and maintain dashboards and reports using Power BI and Excel
Collaborate with various teams across the organization to ensure data accuracy, consistency and integration
Prepare clear, insightful presentations for senior management and commercial stakeholders
Track key performance indicators (KPIs) across products, channels, and customer segments
Support budgeting, forecasting and sales target monitoring through data-driven analysis
Contribute to reporting automation and process improvement initiatives
Handle ad hoc data requests and deliver timely, business-relevant insights
Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Business, Finance, Economics, Data Analytics, or a related field
At least 3 years of experience in business analysis, sales reporting, or performance monitoring
Advanced knowledge of Power BI, Excel, and experience with SQL or other data tools
Proven ability to translate data into actionable business insights
Experience working with cross-functional teams and managing multiple priorities
Personal Skills
Excellent communication and presentation skills, in both spoken and written formats
Collaborative and team-spirited personality
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
Strong organizational skills with attention to detail
A competitive fixed salary package aligned with your experience and expectations
Private insurance, corporate benefits and perks
Continuous training and professional development
Excellent professional environment
Modern and productive working facilities
Don’t miss the chance to join a Great Place to Work-Certified Company that fosters a positive work environment, proudly recognized as a Best Workplace for Women 2025.
All applications will be treated with confidentiality. If your CV meets the requirements of the job, we will contact you by phone to schedule an appointment. Information about the company on our site volton.gr
ai_core_responsibilities: The Sales Business Analyst will analyze sales performance data to identify trends and opportunities for improvement. They will develop dashboards and reports, collaborate with various teams, and prepare presentations for stakeholders.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have a Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in a relevant field and at least 3 years of experience in business analysis or sales reporting. Advanced knowledge of Power BI and Excel, along with strong analytical and communication skills, is required.
linkedin_org_slogan: Καθαρά και έξυπνα
linkedin_org_description:
Welcome to Volton!

We are a dynamic and rapidly expanding Greek company focusing on the electricity and natural gas supply and trading sectors, with our sights on expanding into the Telecommunications field.

Our ambition is to become a major player in the field while remaining in the front line of innovation as the first multiservice provider, by combining electricity, natural gas and telecommunication services.  

The secret ingredient making Volton stand out is our people, and our certification as a Great Place to Work® proves our dedication to our associates. By investing in training and development, we encourage each member of our team to add their own unique characteristic and ideas, contributing to our company’s goal to offer high quality services that fulfill our customer’s needs, while also building a strong and reliable company identity.

title: Property Management Associate
description_text:
About the Role
Do you have a "get it done" attitude when it comes to property maintenance and owner relations? SmartCrowd is seeking a Property Management Associate to protect and maintain our growing portfolio of assets. Based in Dubai, you will bridge the gap between owners, contractors, and building management. You’ll be responsible for the physical and financial health of our properties, ensuring they are move-in ready and operating efficiently. This is the perfect role for a detail-oriented operator who enjoys a mix of office coordination and hands-on property management.

About SmartCrowd
SmartCrowd is where fintech innovation meets real estate investment. Our mission is to make real estate investing accessible through fractional ownership. We create opportunities for investors of different backgrounds to participate in quality property investments. Our team combines technology, analysis, and creativity to redefine how people in the region build wealth.
What You'll Do
Contract Management: Handle property management contracts for both internal (SmartCrowd) and external owners.
Maintenance & Inspections: Arrange maintenance inspections, source competitive quotations from contractors, and manage work permits.
Quality Control: Conduct rigorous pre-move-in and move-out inspections to ensure property standards are maintained.
Financial Management: Oversee utility and service charge payments, manage Noqodi statements, and track/collect management fees.
Landlord Operations: Manage the landlord-side of platforms like Keyper and Tern, ensuring seamless data flow.
Stakeholder Liaison: Coordinate with building management for viewing permits and manage payments to contractors and external owners.
Asset Support: Own the am@smartcrowd.ae inbox, manage office maintenance, and maintain proper record-keeping for all assets.
Legal & Dispute Support: Assist in legal management of handling disputes related to the property, ensuring all documentation is accurate and organized for resolution.
What We're Looking For
Education & Experience: 0–2 years of experience. Fresh graduates who are proactive, handy, and organized are encouraged to apply.
Analytical Mindset: Comfortable managing Noqodi, service charge schedules, and management fee tracking.
Organization: Ability to manage multiple properties and contractors simultaneously without losing track of details.
Proactive Learner: A self-starter who can resolve property issues independently and support the Head of Operations.
Adaptable: Ready to spend time both in the office and visiting properties across Dubai.
Location: Must be based in Dubai, this is an on-site role.
ai_core_responsibilities: The Property Management Associate will manage property contracts, arrange maintenance inspections, and ensure properties are move-in ready. They will also oversee financial management related to utilities and service charges, and coordinate with various stakeholders.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have 0-2 years of experience, with fresh graduates encouraged to apply. An analytical mindset, strong organizational skills, and the ability to work independently are essential for this role.

SmartCrowd | The Easiest Way to Invest in Dubai's Real Estate

SmartCrowd holds the key to unlocking the Dubai real estate market for everyday investors.

Now, you can build a diversified investment property portfolio through our award-winning platform with a minimum investment of just AED 500.

Real estate investing has never been this transparent, convenient, and hassle-free.

Learn more about how you can generate secondary income: 

Our achievements within the FinTech space include:

title: Freelance Energy Engineer with Python Experience - AI Trainer
description_text:
Please submit your CV in English and indicate your level of English proficiency. 
Mindrift connects specialists with project-based AI opportunities for leading tech companies, focused on testing, evaluating, and improving AI systems. Participation isproject-based, not permanent employment.
What this opportunity involves 
While each project involves unique tasks, contributors may: 
Design rigorous energy engineering problems reflecting professional practice; 
Evaluate AI solutions for correctness, assumptions, and constraints; 
Validate calculations or simulations using Python (NumPy, Pandas, SciPy); 
Improve AI reasoning to align with industry-standard logic; 
Apply structured scoring criteria to multi-step problems.
What we look for 
This opportunity is a good fit for energy engineers with an experience in python open to part-time, non-permanent projects. Ideally, contributors will have: 
Degree in Energy Engineering or related fields, e.g. Electrical Engineering, Power Systems Engineering, Renewable Energy Engineering, Electronics etc. 
3+ years of professional energy engineering experience 
Strong written English (C1/C2) 
Strong Python proficiency for numerical validation 
Stable internet connection 
Professional certifications (e.g., PE, CEng, EMP, CEM) and experience in international or applied projects are an advantage.
How it works 
Apply → Pass qualification(s) → Join a project → Complete tasks → Get paid
Project time expectations 
For this project, tasks are estimated to require around 10–20 hours per week during active phases, based on project requirements. This is an estimate, not a guaranteed workload, and applies only while the project is active. 
Payment 
Paid contributions, with rates up to $15/hour* 
Fixed project rate or individual rates, depending on the project 
Some projects include incentive payments 
*Note: Rates vary based on expertise, skills assessment, location, project needs, and other factors. Higher rates may be offered to highly specialized experts. Lower rates may apply during onboarding or non-core project phases. Payment details are shared per project.
ai_core_responsibilities: Contributors will be responsible for designing rigorous energy engineering problems that reflect professional practice and evaluating AI solutions for correctness, constraints, and assumptions. They will also validate calculations using Python libraries and improve AI reasoning to align with industry-standard logic.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must be energy engineers with professional experience and strong Python proficiency for numerical validation, ideally holding a degree in Energy Engineering or related fields. A minimum of 3 years of professional energy engineering experience and strong written English (C1/C2) are required.
linkedin_org_slogan: Be the “I” in AI with Mindrift. Work from anywhere on groundbreaking AI projects
linkedin_org_description:
Welcome to Mindrift — a space where innovation meets opportunity. We’re a pioneering platform dedicated to advancing the field of artificial intelligence through collaborative online projects. Our focus lies in creating data for generative AI, offering a unique chance for freelancers to contribute to AI development from anywhere, at any time.

At Mindrift, we believe in the power of collective intelligence to shape the future of AI. Our platform allows users to dive into a variety of tasks — ranging from creating training prompts for AI models to refining AI responses for greater relevance.

Let’s build the future of AI together, one task at a time.

title: Customer Success Manager - Facility Management - Antwerpen - Limburg
description_text:
Wie is 3P?
3P is een toonaangevend en snelgroeiend softwarebedrijf voor de publieke sector. We zijn Belgische marktleider in software voor overheidsopdrachten en ondersteunen daarnaast honderden organisaties met krachtige oplossingen voor facilitair beheer: werkopdrachten, voorraadbeheer, ontleningen, patrimoniumbeheer, zaalbeheer en contractmanagement.
3P staat bekend om haar uitmuntende service en haar ijzersterke software waarmee we onze klanten dagelijks helpen in hun werking.
Onze klanten zijn even divers als boeiend: steden en gemeenten, ministeries, politiezones, OCMW’s, ziekenhuizen, universiteiten, woonzorgcentra, havenbedrijven en nog veel meer.
Om onze groei verder te ondersteunen, zoeken we een Customer Success Manager Facility Management die mee het verschil wil maken.
Jouw rol?
Als Customer Success Manager ben jij de strategische partner van je klanten. Jij zorgt ervoor dat zij maximaal rendement halen uit onze facilitaire modules, vandaag én morgen.
Je begeleidt organisaties doorheen hun digitalisering, bouwt duurzame relaties op en detecteert opportuniteiten om hun werking nog efficiënter te maken via upsell en cross-sell.
Je beheert een eigen klantenportefeuille binnen de publieke sector en bent hun vaste aanspreekpunt.
Wat ga je concreet doen? 
Relatiebeheer & klantensucces: Je volgt je klanten actief op, luistert naar hun noden en waakt over hun tevredenheid. Je zorgt ervoor dat zij onze software correct en optimaal gebruiken en begeleidt hen in de uitrol van bijkomende modules.
Opleidingen & consultancy: Je geeft opleidingen en demo’s bij klanten: van eerste kennismaking tot verdiepende sessies en nieuwe functionaliteiten. Je past je aanpak moeiteloos aan het doelpubliek aan, een gemeente werkt nu eenmaal anders dan een politiezone of een sociale huisvestingsmaatschappij.
Implementatie & onboarding: Je ondersteunt klanten bij de opstart: installatie, parametrisatie en ingebruikname van de software. Geen zorgen: je hoeft geen IT-specialist te zijn, wij zorgen voor een grondige opleiding.
Eerste aanspreekpunt: Je beantwoordt vragen, denkt mee, stelt gerust en blijft professioneel en assertief wanneer verandering weerstand oproept.
Productverbetering: Je koppelt feedback en ideeën van klanten terug naar onze R&D-teams en test nieuwe functionaliteiten. Zo help jij mee bouwen aan de toekomst van 3P.
Werkplek: Je werkt deels autonoom van thuis en deels bij klanten voor het geven van de opleidingen. Tevens word je eenmaal per week verwacht in onze kantoren te Kontich.
Je hoeft niet alles al te kunnen, goesting, talent en groeipotentieel zijn voor ons doorslaggevend:
Je beschikt over een masterdiploma en bent analytisch sterk
Je hebt 0 tot 7 jaar ervaring (schoolverlaters zijn absoluut welkom)
Je haalt energie uit klantencontact
Je hebt de passie om opleidingen te geven voor een groep van gebruikers en kennis over te dragen
Je communiceert vlot, professioneel en met zelfvertrouwe
Je werkt autonoom en behoudt overzicht, ook in drukke periodes
Je hebt commerciële feeling en durft opportuniteiten te benoemen
Je blijft rustig en assertief bij weerstand of kritische vragen
Je streeft naar kwaliteit en laat niets half af
Waarom kiezen voor 3P?
Team & cultuur: Bij 3P draait alles rond samenwerking. Je maakt deel uit van een hecht team van Customer Success Managers, product managers en collega’s in België en Frankrijk. Positive Party People is geen slogan, maar een realiteit: teamlunches, teambuildings en een open, warme sfeer horen erbij.
Groei & ontwikkeling: 3P groeit, en jij groeit mee. Je krijgt ruimte om jezelf te ontwikkelen, expertise op te bouwen en door te groeien in verantwoordelijkheden binnen een innovatieve omgeving.
Vertrouwen & autonomie: Wij geloven in ownership. Je krijgt vrijheid, verantwoordelijkheid en het vertrouwen om initiatief te nemen en impact te maken.
Wat mag je van ons verwachten ?
Je komt terecht in een ambitieus groeibedrijf met een jonge bedrijfscultuur en aangename werkomgeving. 3P biedt jou een boeiende job met veel vrijheid, een vast contract van onbepaalde duur, een interessante verloning boven marktgemiddelde, minimaal 30 vakantiedagen, mooie bedrijfswagen, iPhone, laptop, groepsverzekering, pensioenplan, hospitalisatieverzekering, cafetariaplan (o.a. leasing fiets), thuiswerkbudget, maaltijdcheques, talrijke teambuildings,…
ai_core_responsibilities: As a Customer Success Manager, you will be the strategic partner for clients, ensuring they maximize the use of facility management software. You will manage client relationships, provide training, support implementation, and gather feedback for product improvement.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have a master's degree and possess strong analytical skills, with 0 to 7 years of experience. A passion for customer interaction and the ability to communicate effectively are essential.
linkedin_org_slogan: De softwarespecialist voor de publieke sector! /  le logiciel spécialist du secteur public!
linkedin_org_description:
3P is DE Belgische software specialist voor de (semi-)publieke sector. Als marktleider voor wat betreft de opvolging van overheidsopdrachten van A tot Z bieden wij daarnaast een complete software aan voor uw facilitair beheer en contractbeheer.

Onze klanten zijn actief in verschillende domeinen van de (semi)-publieke sector: steden en gemeenten, provincies, ministeries, agentschappen, OCMW’s, ziekenhuizen, zorgbedrijven, woonzorgcentra, politiezones, hulpverleningszones, scholen, universiteiten, sociale huisvestingsmaatschappijen, intercommunales, nutsbedrijven,…

Bij 3P plaatsen we de wensen en behoeften van onze klanten steeds centraal. We gaan dag in dag uit voor onberispelijke service en helpen u om de software te gebruiken. Verder staan we steeds klaar om u te ondersteunen met onze helpdesk, opleidingen en advies op maat.

3P bestaat uit een dynamisch team van enthousiaste experts, allen toegewijd om het verschil te maken voor onze klanten. 

Lees meer over 3P via www.3p.eu

title: Transport Administrator
description_text:
Transport Administrator / Traffic Dispatcher 
Monday to Friday (40hrs) 
Location: Nottingham Depot 
A quick look at the role.
The Traffic Dispatcher is responsible for managing the day-to-day organisation of operations in the depot through the allocation and basic routing of vehicles. You will ensure best in class service delivery to customers, ensuring health & safety standards are maintained, and ensuring environmental and O licence compliance.
If you thrive in a dynamic environment, enjoy problem-solving, and are passionate about delivering an exceptional service, this is the role for you.
Your Core Responsibilities 
Optimising routes and vehicle utilisation to deliver top-class service.
Managing driver availability and ensuring compliance with regulations.
Overseeing vehicle checks, safety, and maintenance.
Handling admin tasks like payroll, timesheets, tachograph records, and reporting.
Driving cost-efficiency by analysing depot data and improving operations.
This is more than just a desk job! You’ll also have the chance to get hands-on with employee engagement and improvement initiatives.
Our essential requirements
A strong knowledge of the local area.
The ability to plan, prioritise, and meet tight deadlines.
A solutions-driven mindset and a knack for problem-solving.
Proficiency with business software and MS Office (especially Excel).
Experience in admin, call handling, or a time-critical environment is a plus.
Biffa - Changing the way people think about waste.
At Biffa, we love working with waste. Whether we’re turning it into sustainable power, finding new ways to recycle it or simply keeping it off the streets, we believe every day is an opportunity to improve the lives of millions. It’s a view that’s shared by our 11,000+ people around the country, who trust us to provide them with a career that’s always rewarding, often challenging, but never dull. And it’s why we’re the UK’s No. 1 choice for business waste management.
Dedicated to diversity.
Being inclusive is core to our culture at Biffa; we believe different ideas, perspectives and backgrounds are key to developing a creative and effective working environment that represents our communities and generates the best outcomes for colleagues, customers and stakeholders, which is why you’ll find us championing diversity, equity and inclusion at every turn.
ai_core_responsibilities: The Traffic Dispatcher manages day-to-day operations in the depot, focusing on vehicle allocation and routing. They ensure service delivery, health and safety standards, and compliance with regulations.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have a strong knowledge of the local area and the ability to plan and prioritise effectively. Experience in administrative roles or time-critical environments is advantageous.
linkedin_org_slogan: We’re here to change the way people think about waste.
linkedin_org_locations: Coronation Road, High Wycombe, Buckinghamshire HP12 3TZ, GB
linkedin_org_description:
Founded in London in 1912, Biffa is a leading UK nationwide integrated waste management business providing collection, treatment, recycling and technologically-driven energy generation services. Through the expertise of our people and investment in technology we promote and deliver sustainable waste management solutions.

We provide an essential service to satisfy the business needs of our commercial, industrial and public sector customers throughout the UK, and help them to meet their legal obligations and corporate responsibility commitments.

We employ 10,000 people and collect waste from thousands of businesses and millions of households across the UK each day.  

Our surplus food redistribution partnership with Company Shop Group, and our environmental work with BiffaAward and Waste Aid, also have wider benefits for the UK and beyond. 

Since 2002 we’ve reduced our carbon emissions by 70 per cent and aim to be net zero by 2050.

title: Partnership Manager
description_text:
Do you get energized by building strong relationships, spotting growth opportunities, and turning strategic partnerships into long‑lasting success stories?
At Deployteq, we’re looking for a Partnership Manager who is ready to make real impact — on our partners, on our organization, and on the future of marketing technology.
🚀 About Deployteq
Deployteq is a unique collective of passionate, knowledgeable, and enthusiastic professionals. With more than 75 colleagues, we innovate, professionalize, and make high‑quality online marketing solutions accessible worldwide.
From our offices in Huis ter Heide (NL) and London (UK), we work every day to help organizations increase customer loyalty and customer value. Collaboration, personal development, and ambition are at the core of who we are.
Our international growth EU and the UK, is increasingly fueled by partnerships with top‑tier marketing agencies. And you will be the person expanding and strengthening that foundation.
🤝 Your Role: Build the strongest partner ecosystem across NL & EU
As our new Partnership Manager, you will be the strategic and tactical sparring partner for preselected partners. You ensure they feel seen, understood, and supported, while you translate their goals into practical solutions using Deployteq’s products and services.
You will:
· Strengthening relationships with A‑marketing agencies that shape the campaigns of leading brands.
· Collaborating within an international partner team that is sharp, supportive, and impact‑driven.
· Spotting and converting commercial opportunities within both existing and new agency partnerships.
· Developing strategic growth and account plans that are actually executed, not forgotten.
· Representing the voice and needs of our partners within Deployteq, your insights matter.
· Identifying market developments across NL/EU and translating them into action.
· Leading contract negotiations and proactively involving partners in innovation and product improvements.
This role places you at the center of our international ecosystem of agencies, clients, and technology.
🌱 Why This Role Matters
Our partners are essential to Deployteq’s growth. You will be the one nurturing, guiding, and elevating those relationships.
Your insights, initiative, and energy directly shape our service and impact in the market.
This is not a “keep things running” job, it’s a “take us to the next level” job.
🧠 What You Bring
You are commercially sharp, analytically strong, and communication is your superpower. With your proactive mindset, you don’t wait for opportunities — you create them.
You have:
● Loves working with top‑tier agencies and understands their business
● Combines strategic thinking with commercial sharpness
● Bachelor’s/Master’s level thinking.
● 3–5 years of experience in a similar partnership, account management, or commercial role.
● Strong negotiation skills and a customer‑first mentality.
● Excellent written & verbal communication in Dutch and English.
● A proactive, entrepreneurial, and solution‑oriented mindset.
● Analytical ability and attention to detail.
● The flexibility and drive to thrive in a dynamic environment (no 9‑to‑5 mentality).
You are: energetic, persistent, collaborative, and always one step ahead.
🌟 What We Offer
At Deployteq, you’ll join an inspiring, ambitious, and supportive team where you can grow professionally and personally. We offer:
A challenging and impactful role within a rapidly growing tech company.
Room to develop your ideas and truly influence outcomes.
A collaborative work culture with enthusiastic colleagues.
Opportunities to expand your expertise in marketing technology and partnerships.
💬 Ready to Shape the Future Together?
Are you the Partnership Manager who wants to help us elevate our partner ecosystem and accelerate Deployteq’s growth?
We’d love to meet you.
Apply now and let’s create success, together.
ai_core_responsibilities: The Partnership Manager will build and strengthen relationships with marketing agencies, ensuring they feel supported while translating their goals into practical solutions. This role involves spotting commercial opportunities, developing strategic growth plans, and representing partner needs within Deployteq.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have 3-5 years of experience in a partnership or account management role, with strong negotiation skills and a customer-first mentality. Excellent communication in Dutch and English, along with a proactive and analytical mindset, is essential.
linkedin_org_locations: Amersfoortseweg 10E, Huis ter Heide, Utrecht 3712 BC, NL
linkedin_org_description:
Deployteq is an award-winning marketing automation platform, making it easy for marketers to automate omnichannel, personalised customer journeys that enhance engagement, revenue and business growth.

Through highly intelligent use of data along with insights based on behaviours and interactions, Deployteq empowers marketing teams to connect more deeply with their customers, create immersive experiences and build brand loyalty.

Brands using Deployteq to deliver tech-enabled, agile content through their customer communications include Wickes, Vodafone Ziggo, Virgin Media, Marstons, Tui, Pendragon and many more.

title: Payments Specialist
description_text:
Guru Pay is an EMI based in Lithuania with a goal to deliver a personalized boutique service to B2B, B2C and C2B customers. Our team is small, yet highly ambitious in delivering high-tier service for our business accounts.
We are looking for a reliable and ownership-driven Payments Specialist to support daily payment operations and ensure smooth execution of domestic and international transactions. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys structured work, takes responsibility seriously, and is motivated to improve processes in a fast-paced environment.
What will you do:
Execute and monitor domestic and international payments across SEPA, SWIFT, FX, and real-time rails
Handle SWIFT messages related to payment investigations, recalls, and inquiries
Monitor customer and pooled account balances and support settlement activities
Coordinate settlement releases, reversals, and cut-off–related issues
Perform financial transaction data entry via online banking platforms
Analyze failed payments, reconciliation breaks, chargebacks, and disputes
Support Customer Service teams in resolving payment-related cases
Communicate with banking and payment partners on operational issues
Identify technical or process inefficiencies and drive improvements or automation
Prepare client fee calculations and provide regular payment KPI and reconciliation reports
What we expect:
2+ years of experience in payments, reconciliation, or a similar financial role
Good understanding of payment operations, especially SEPA and SWIFT
Ability to work independently and take ownership of issues end-to-end
Strong communication skills in Lithuanian and English
Comfortable with routine tasks while adapting to new projects and changes
Willingness to speak up, suggest improvements, and accept feedback
Full-time availability from our Vilnius office (3 days on-site after onboarding)
Nice to have:
Experience in the acquiring field
Deep hands-on knowledge of SEPA and SWIFT
Experience working on projects involving new partners and products, including testing, implementation, and integration into the team’s daily operations.
What will you get:
Gross salary EUR 2,200 – 2,800, depending on experience
A role with real responsibility in core payment operations
Opportunities to improve and automate processes
A supportive team with high standards and clear ownership
Hybrid work model (Vilnius office + flexibility)
Support for professional development and continuous learning
2nd pillar pension coverage
An extra vacation day on your birthday
Workations, health challenges, and team engagement initiatives
A collaborative, high-trust environment with real impact on the business
ai_core_responsibilities: The Payments Specialist will execute and monitor domestic and international payments, handle payment investigations, and support settlement activities. They will also analyze failed payments and communicate with banking partners on operational issues.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have 2+ years of experience in payments or a similar financial role and a good understanding of payment operations, especially SEPA and SWIFT. Strong communication skills in Lithuanian and English are required, along with the ability to work independently.
linkedin_org_slogan:
Online banking for SMEs:
• IBANs
• SEPA Instant
• SWIFT
• FX
• API
• Internet Banking

Built to scale with you.
linkedin_org_locations: Basanaviciaus st. 24, Vilnius, Lithuania LT-03224, LT

title: Investment Consultant (European)
description_text:
Tanami Properties is a premier real estate agency in Dubai, recognized for its expertise in off-plan properties and luxury real estate. With strong partnerships with top developers, we provide our clients with exclusive access to Dubai’s most lucrative investment opportunities. Join our team and be part of a company that’s setting new standards in the Dubai real estate market.
Role Overview:
We are looking for a motivated and results-driven Investment Consultant (European) to join Tanami Properties. You will specialize in connecting clients with upcoming projects, guiding investors and end-users through off-plan purchases, and maximizing sales opportunities in Dubai’s fast-growing property market.
Key Responsibilities:
Promote and sell off-plan properties directly from top-tier Dubai developers.
Develop and maintain strong relationships with investors, end-users, and developer sales teams.
Advise clients on project details, payment plans, ROI, and market trends.
Conduct property presentations, attend project launches, and represent the company at real estate events.
Generate and manage leads through marketing campaigns, referrals, and networking.
Achieve and exceed monthly and quarterly sales targets.
Proven sales experience (off-plan real estate experience preferred)
Strong presentation and negotiation skills
Ability to build lasting relationships with investors and property buyers
Self-motivated, energetic, and target-driven
Unlimited Earning Potential with our Competitive Commission Structure
Rewards for Top Performers – Recognition and incentives for your outstanding achievements.
Career Growth & Progression – Clear paths to senior roles and leadership opportunities.
Employment Benefits – Full employment visa and medical insurance.
Exclusive Tools & Resources:
RERA License Provided by the Company
CRM system to manage clients efficiently
Marketing support, including professional video shoots
Fresh Leads Provided – Start your sales journey with pre-qualified client leads.
Exclusive Property Portfolio – Access to all developers and Dubai’s most lucrative off-plan projects.
Professional Training – Learn directly from big developers
Prime Office Location in Dubai Marina – Modern, centrally located office with a vibrant work environment.
Be Part of the Best – Join a top-performing team in one of Dubai’s top 10 real estate agencies and take your career to the next level.
Ready to take your real estate career to new heights! Apply now and become a key player in Dubai’s booming off-plan property market!
ai_core_responsibilities: The Investment Consultant will promote and sell off-plan properties, develop relationships with clients, and advise them on market trends and project details. They will also generate leads and achieve sales targets in Dubai's property market.

Trusted Real Estate company!
Investment specialists in Dubai, UAE

Tanami Properties is a company incorporated in United Arab Emirates, based in Dubai, with the Objective to add transparency to the UAE Real Estate Market by Delivering Unique Real Estate Knowledge and Remarkable Experience to its customers.

We partner with large developers such as Emaar, Damac, Dubai Properties, Nshama and many others and we are proudly a subsidiary of a large holding company, The Emirates Business Group.

Tanami Properties offers a full range of Real Estate services including Sales of Under Construction (New Developments) and Completed Properties, Investments Consultancy, Real Estate Advisory, Mortgage Advisory and Property Management.

Our team comes from different cultural and professional backgrounds, speaks more than dozen languages and each one of us specializes in the offered services. We have successfully sold Properties of over AED 500 Million worth in 2016, enabling many investors and families to meet their Real Estate objectives.

Our agency is client centric, ensuring our clients are assisted in the best possible way and advised with the right products that fulfills their Lifestyle and Financial Returns objectives.

Our Property Consultants ensure that both Investors and End Users are offered real estate developments that meet their requirements and at the same time achieve high returns of investment (both annual rental returns and Price appreciation).

We also offer property Investment Management and Advisory Services to Local, Regional and Global Investors with attractive opportunities, guaranteeing minimum risks with high yields.

Tanami Properties is certified by RERA, Dubai Land Department and is well positioned to service its Local and International Clients..
